## 🚀 Quick Start

### Option 1: Local Setup
```bash
# Navigate to lesson folder
cd path/to/lesson

# Install dependencies (if specific to this lesson)
pip install -r requirements.txt

# Launch Jupyter
jupyter notebook
```

### Option 2: Cloud Platforms

## 🎓 Learning Path

```
Start Here ──→ Foundations ──→ Core Concepts ──→ Advanced Topics ──→ Practice Project
     ↓              ↓                ↓                  ↓                  ↓
  Overview      Basics           Theory           Advanced          Exercises
                                Implementation    Techniques         Project
```

**Recommended order:**
1. Read this README
2. Complete notebooks in sequence (01 → 02 → ...)
3. Try exercises
4. Build project
5. Review key concepts
